hero.designNotes: Royal Gujarati Palace Hero for Kavya & Mihir. The design uses a deep burnt-umber and midnight brown gradient base evoking a palatial Indian evening ambience, lit by warm gold radial glows. The layout is a three-column grid: two flanking ornamental columns (each with an animated diya flame, vertical typography, and rangoli dot trails) bracketing a commanding centred composition. Names are set in Rozha One at hero scale with a warm gold metallic gradient and drop glow. An italic Cormorant Garamond ampersand floats within a pulsing mandala ring. Cultural markers include a Gujarati "Shri Ganesh Naam" blessing in Noto Serif Gujarati, a bilingual sub-message, and a full CSS-drawn toran strip at the footer with alternating mango and leaf elements on a golden cord — all rendered in pure CSS with no images. Floating marigold-orange petal shapes drift at the sides via keyframe animation. A glass-effect venue pill with a subtle gold glow pulse anchors the location. Primary CTA uses a metallic gold gradient; ghost CTA uses an outlined style. All animations are CSS-only. Fully responsive: side columns collapse on mobile, type scales fluidly, toran simplifies gracefully.
